classes.name: FastVlmMultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN(gelu) -> Linear projector; verified L1/linear.py implements bias-aware Linear that matches the two nn.Linear instantiations and L1/gelu.py would supply the activation when run. No fused kb-nano L2 wrapper exists for this small projector

classes.name: FastVlmModel
classes.rationale: Wiring class: vision tower (timm fastvit) + projector + language_model (qwen2). All compute is delegated to children; no own kernel

classes.name: FastVlmForConditionalGeneration
classes.rationale: Wiring class wrapping FastVlmModel + lm_head; composes only

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerDurationPredictor
classes.rationale: Stack of FastSpeech2ConformerPredictorLayer (Conv1d + ReLU + LayerNorm + Dropout) followed by Linear; pure composition over Conv1d/Linear. No specialized kb-nano file

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerBatchNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + BatchNorm1d + Tanh + Dropout. kb-nano has L1/conv1d.py for the conv and L1/batch_norm2d.py for batch norm; no L1 BatchNorm1d so closest match is BN2d wrapper. No specialized kb-nano file matches the full block

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerSpeechDecoderPostnet
classes.rationale: Composes Linear + stack of FastSpeech2ConformerBatchNormConvLayer; wiring only

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerPredictorLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + ReLU + LayerNorm + Dropout. Verified each L1 op exists; no fused kb-nano L2 file

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerVariancePredictor
classes.rationale: Stack of PredictorLayer + Linear; pure composition

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerAttention
classes.rationale: Conformer-style multi-head attention with Transformer-XL relative position encoding (matrix_ac + matrix_bd shift). Has separate Q/K/V/pos linear projections plus learnable pos_bias_u/pos_bias_v. No kb-nano file implements rel-pos shifted attention; would decompose to L1/linear.py + manual matmul/softmax. Closest existing wrapper L2/encoder_attention.py uses non-causal SDPA without rel-pos bias, so does NOT match

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerConvolutionModule
classes.rationale: Pointwise Conv1d (gate_up doubled) + GLU + depthwise Conv1d + BatchNorm1d + activation + pointwise Conv1d. kb-nano has L1/conv1d.py; F.glu and BN1d have no specialized kernels

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: macaron FFN + ConformerAttention + ConvolutionModule + FFN with LayerNorms; pure composition

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerMultiLayeredConv1d
classes.rationale: Conv1d + ReLU + Dropout + Conv1d positionwise FFN; wires L1 ops only

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerRelPositionalEncoding
classes.rationale: Pre-computed Transformer-XL relative positional encoding buffer; no kernel kb-nano file matches

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerLoss
classes.rationale: Loss function (training only); no inference kernel

classes.name: HifiGanResidualBlock
classes.rationale: Stack of LeakyReLU + Conv1d (with weight_norm); L1 ops cover the building blocks

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerHifiGan
classes.rationale: Vocoder: Conv1d + ConvTranspose1d + ResidualBlock stack; wiring only

classes.name: FastSpeech2ConformerWithHifiGan
classes.rationale: Combines FastSpeech2 model + HifiGan vocoder; wiring

classes.name: MultiHeadAttention
classes.rationale: XLM/Flaubert-style MHA with separate Q/K/V Linear projections, optional KV cache, additive mask, and softmax+dropout; matches encoder-style bidirectional attention. L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention has separate Q/K/V Linear with bias and SDPA; verified compatible (non-causal mask path)

classes.name: TransformerFFN
classes.rationale: Linear -> GELU/ReLU -> Linear; matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate+EncoderOutput pattern (GELU activation), verified L1 deps include L1/gelu.py and L1/linear.py

classes.name: FlaubertPredLayer
classes.rationale: Single Linear projection over hidden -> vocab_size; LM prediction head

classes.name: FlaubertSQuADHead
classes.rationale: Composes the three FlaubertPooler heads; wiring

classes.name: FlaubertSequenceSummary
classes.rationale: Linear summary projection with optional activation

classes.name: FlaubertModel
classes.rationale: Stack of MultiHeadAttention + TransformerFFN layers with embeddings; wiring class

classes.name: FlavaImageEmbeddings
classes.rationale: PatchEmbeddings (Conv2d patch projection) + CLS token + position_embedding + mask_token; closest to vision_patch_embed.py for the Conv2d portion. The full embedding is wiring beyond patch embed

classes.name: PatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d-based patch embedding for ViT-style image tokenization; verified L2/vision_patch_embed.py implements Conv2d patch projection

classes.name: FlavaTextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position + token_type embeddings + LayerNorm + Dropout. L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase implements exactly this triplet (word_embeddings + position_embeddings + token_type_embeddings + LayerNorm)

classes.name: FlavaSelfAttention
classes.rationale: ViT/BERT-style self-attention with separate Q/K/V Linear (bias=qkv_bias), softmax over scaled dot-product, dropout. Verified L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention has separate Q/K/V Linear bias=True paths and supports non-causal SDPA path

classes.name: FlavaAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring class around FlavaSelfAttention + FlavaSelfOutput (BERT/ViT pattern). Compute lives in FlavaSelfAttention; mark composes per rule 11

classes.name: FlavaIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU intermediate, identical to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate

classes.name: FlavaOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + Dropout + LayerNorm(input + dense), identical to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput

classes.name: FlavaLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring layer: pre-LN + FlavaAttention + FlavaIntermediate + FlavaOutput

classes.name: FlavaPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh on CLS token; standard BERT pooler

classes.name: FlavaImageCodebookResPath
classes.rationale: ResNet-style residual path: Conv2d + ReLU stack used by codebook

classes.name: FlavaImageCodebook
classes.rationale: DALL-E style discrete VAE codebook (Conv2d-only stack); wiring

classes.name: FlavaPredictionHeadTransform
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LayerNorm transform before MLM head

classes.name: FlavaMaskedPredictionHead
classes.rationale: MLM head: transform + decoder Linear with bias

classes.name: FlavaGlobalContrastiveHead
classes.rationale: Contrastive logits head (no parameters of its own beyond logit_scale); training-only

classes.name: FlexOlmoRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Olmo2RMSNorm is Llama-style RMSNorm (weight initialized to ones, x * rsqrt(variance + eps) * weight). Verified L1/rms_norm.py implements identical formula

classes.name: FlexOlmoRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard RoPE inheriting from Olmo2 (which is the standard precompute cos/sin pattern). L1/rotary_emb.py is the unified RoPE kernel

classes.name: FlexOlmoMLP
classes.rationale: OlmoeMLP is gate_proj + up_proj + SiLU + down_proj SwiGLU pattern (verified at /tmp/.../olmoe/modeling_olmoe.py:134). Maps to L2/llama_mlp.py which uses MergedColumnParallelLinear gate_up + SiluAndMul + RowParallelLinear

classes.name: FlexOlmoAttention
classes.rationale: Olmo2Attention has q/k/v/o Linear + q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm + RoPE + standard SDPA. Maps to L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention with qk_norm=True

classes.name: FlexOlmoTopKRouter
classes.rationale: Top-k router with softmax then top-k; pure softmax+topk routing without group routing. L1/topk_softmax.py implements topk-softmax for routers

classes.name: FlexOlmoSparseMoeBlock
classes.rationale: Standard top-k expert dispatch with OlmoeMLP-pattern experts (no shared expert). Maps to fused_experts.py + moe_grouped_gemm.py for the per-expert SwiGLU GEMMs

classes.name: FlexOlmoDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: post_attention_layernorm + FlexOlmoAttention + post_feedforward_layernorm + FlexOlmoSparseMoeBlock (Olmo2 puts norm AFTER, not before)

classes.name: FlexOlmoModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring (no sliding window); pure composition

classes.name: Florence2VisionLearnedAbsolutePositionEmbedding2D
classes.rationale: 2D learned position embeddings (sum of row and column nn.Embedding lookups)

classes.name: Florence2VisionPositionalEmbeddingCosine1D
classes.rationale: Computes sinusoidal cos/sin positional encoding; no trainable params kernel

classes.name: Florence2VisionMLP
classes.rationale: Florence-2 OVERRIDES __init__: fc1 + ACT2FN + fc2 (two-layer FFN with non-fused GELU); NOT SwiGLU. Despite inheriting Llama4VisionMLP, the overridden __init__ replaces it. Closest L2 wrapper L2/encoder_mlp.py uses GELU but with LayerNorm wrapper which Florence's MLP lacks; decompose to L1 ops

classes.name: Florence2VisionChannelAttention
classes.rationale: DaViT channel-wise attention: Linear QKV + permuted softmax across channels (not spatial). No kb-nano specialized file; decomposes to L1/linear.py + L1/softmax.py

classes.name: Florence2VisionWindowAttention
classes.rationale: Window-partitioned spatial attention with fused QKV. kb-nano L2/swinv2_window_attention.py implements Swin-style windowed attention but with relative position bias; Florence2's window attn has no rel pos bias, so does NOT match swinv2 file. Decomposes to L1/linear.py + L1/sdpa.py

classes.name: Florence2VisionSpatialBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: depthwise conv + LayerNorm + WindowAttention + MLP

classes.name: Florence2MultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: Linear projection + LayerNorm + 2D position embedding + temporal cosine embedding

classes.name: Florence2Model
classes.rationale: Wiring: vision backbone + projector + BART-style text encoder/decoder

classes.name: FNetEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style embeddings (word + position + token_type) + LayerNorm + Dropout. Maps to L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase pattern (verified embeds + LayerNorm)

classes.name: FNetBasicFourierTransform
classes.rationale: FNet-specific: torch.fft.fftn or two-dim DFT matmul (NOT attention); replaces self-attention with a parameter-free Fourier mixing. No kb-nano file implements FFT-based mixing

classes.name: FNetOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout + LayerNorm(out+input); identical to L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderOutput

classes.name: FNetPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh on CLS token (BERT-style pooler)

classes.name: FocalNetEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: PatchEmbeddings + LayerNorm + optional mask token + Dropout

classes.name: FocalNetPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection (single conv) + optional LayerNorm

classes.name: FocalNetModulation
classes.rationale: FocalNet-specific focal modulation: gate-and-aggregate over multi-scale depthwise convs (NOT attention). Composes Conv2d, GELU, Linear, AdaptiveAvgPool, AvgPool. No kb-nano file matches; decomposes to L1/conv2d.py + L1/linear.py + L1/gelu.py + L1/adaptive_avg_pool2d.py + L1/avg_pool2d.py

classes.name: FocalNetMlp
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN + fc2 + Dropout MLP. Verified L2/vit_encoder_mlp.py implements the same fc1+GELU+fc2 pattern with optional dropout

classes.name: FocalNetLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LayerNorm + FocalNetModulation + FocalNetMlp + drop path

classes.name: EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Bart/FSMT-style encoder layer: Attention (self-attn) + LayerNorm + Linear(fc1) + activation + Linear(fc2) + LayerNorm. Wiring across Attention + fc1/fc2

classes.name: FSMTEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: token embed + sinusoidal pos embed + stack of EncoderLayer

classes.name: DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Bart/FSMT-style decoder layer: self-attn (Attention with KV cache) + cross-attn (Attention encoder_decoder_attention=True) + FFN. Wiring across two Attention blocks + FFN

classes.name: FSMTDecoder
classes.rationale: Wiring: token embed + sinusoidal pos embed + stack of DecoderLayer + output projection

classes.name: Attention
classes.rationale: Bart/FSMT MHA with separate q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/out_proj Linear (bias=True), additive mask, softmax+dropout. Per audit guidelines (rule 'Bart-family / encoder-decoder attention with separate Q/K/V no-RoPE, decompose to L1'): no specific kb-nano file; decomposes to L1/linear.py + L1/softmax.py + manual matmul. Both encoder-self, decoder-self, and decoder-cross variants share this same class with encoder_decoder_attention flag

classes.name: SinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Pre-computed sin/cos positional embedding stored as an nn.Embedding lookup. L1/sinusoidal_embed.py is the matching kernel

classes.name: FunnelEmbeddings
classes.rationale: word_embeddings + LayerNorm + Dropout (no position/type embedding); simpler than BERT embeddings

classes.name: FunnelAttentionStructure
classes.rationale: Funnel-specific position encoding/pooling utilities (relative positional encodings + token-type bias precomputation); no kb-nano match

classes.name: FunnelRelMultiheadAttention
classes.rationale: Funnel-specific relative MHA with Transformer-XL position bias + token-type bias + class-token bias; uses Linear q/k/v/r and reuses positional embeddings stored in attention_inputs. No kb-nano file matches the rel-pos shifted attention

classes.name: FunnelPositionwiseFFN
classes.rationale: Linear -> ACT2FN -> Linear -> LayerNorm + dropout; matches L2/encoder_mlp.py:EncoderIntermediate+EncoderOutput pattern (post-LN style)

classes.name: FunnelEncoder
classes.rationale: Wiring with strided pooling between blocks (Funnel pooling architecture)

classes.name: FunnelClassificationHead
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh + Dropout + Linear classification head

classes.name: FuyuModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: vision_embed_tokens (single nn.Linear from patch pixels to hidden) + delegate to language_model (Persimmon LM via AutoModel). The Linear is the only own kernel

classes.name: GemmaTextScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: nn.Embedding subclass with multiplicative scale (sqrt(hidden_size)) applied at forward; L1/embedding.py is the underlying lookup

classes.name: GemmaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Gemma-specific RMSNorm: weight stored as offset from 1.0 (uses (1 + weight) at runtime) and cast-back-after-multiply order. Verified L1/gemma_rms_norm.py implements (1+weight) Gemma convention exactly (lines 26-49)

classes.name: GemmaMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU-style MLP with separate gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj and ACT2FN[hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh'] (NOT silu). The fused-gate-up runtime kernel for tanh GELU is L2/gemma4_mlp.py which uses GeluAndMul('tanh'); same activation/topology as Gemma1

classes.name: GemmaRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaRotaryEmbedding standard RoPE; verified L1/rotary_emb.py is the unified RoPE kernel

classes.name: GemmaAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention (q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/o_proj + RoPE + standard SDPA). L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers this; no qk_norm/sliding_window for Gemma1

classes.name: GemmaModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: scaled embed + decoder layer stack + final RMSNorm

classes.name: Gemma2MLP
classes.rationale: Same gate/up/down with gelu_pytorch_tanh; L2/gemma4_mlp.py with GeluAndMul('tanh') is the matching kernel

classes.name: Gemma2Attention
classes.rationale: Adds sliding_window per layer_type and attn_logit_softcapping. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention supports sliding_window kwarg; attn-logit-softcap is a numerical detail handled by attention_impl. Verified L2/attention.py imports L1/rms_norm.py + parallel_linear + Attention

classes.name: Gemma2DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-LN attention + post-LN + pre-FF LN + MLP + post-FF LN

classes.name: Gemma3TextScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: Embedding lookup with hidden_size**0.5 multiplicative scale

classes.name: Gemma3MLP
classes.rationale: Same gate/up/down + gelu_pytorch_tanh as Gemma2; L2/gemma4_mlp.py matches

classes.name: Gemma3RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Per-layer-type RoPE (full vs sliding); each variant uses standard precompute -- L1/rotary_emb.py covers each

classes.name: Gemma3Attention
classes.rationale: Adds q_norm/k_norm Gemma3RMSNorm before RoPE. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention supports qk_norm=True (uses RMSNorm on Q/K). Caveat: kb-nano LlamaAttention uses standard RMSNorm; Gemma uses (1+weight) GemmaRMSNorm. The sliding_window per layer is supported via the sliding_window kwarg; verified L2/attention.py lines 47, 75-80

classes.name: Gemma3DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre-LN + Attention + post-LN + pre-FF-LN + MLP + post-FF-LN

classes.name: Gemma3TextModel
classes.rationale: Top-level text-only wiring with bidirectional/sliding mask routing

classes.name: Gemma3MultiModalProjector
classes.rationale: AvgPool2d on vision tokens + Gemma3RMSNorm (gemma RMSNorm) + a learned projection weight (mm_input_projection_weight). L1/avg_pool2d.py + gemma_rms_norm.py cover the kernels; the matmul is a torch.matmul

classes.name: Gemma3Model
classes.rationale: Wiring: Gemma3TextModel + SigLIP vision tower + projector

classes.name: Gemma3nRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Gemma (1+weight) RMSNorm; supports with_scale=False (weightless) variant for some uses

classes.name: Gemma3nAudioRelativePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: Audio-encoder relative position embedding (Conformer-style); custom math, no kb-nano kernel

classes.name: Gemma3nAudioAttention
classes.rationale: Conformer-style audio attention with relative position bias; no kb-nano file matches (FastSpeech-like rel-pos shift). Decomposes to L1/linear.py + L1/softmax.py

classes.name: Gemma3nAudioCumulativeGroupNorm
classes.rationale: Cumulative group norm (custom audio-specific); no kb-nano file

classes.name: Gemma3nAudioSSCPConvBlock
classes.rationale: SSCP conv block (Conv2d + cumulative group norm + activation)

classes.name: Gemma3nAudioConformerAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring: Gemma3nRMSNorm + Gemma3nAudioAttention; per-block conformer attn

classes.name: Gemma3nAudioConformerFeedForward
classes.rationale: Conformer FFN: norm + Linear + SiLU + Linear + dropout

classes.name: Gemma3nAudioConformerBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: macaron FFN + ConformerAttention + ConformerLightConv1d + FFN

classes.name: Gemma3nTextLaurelBlock
classes.rationale: Gemma3n Laurel residual block: two small Linear projections (low-rank residual); no specialized kb-nano file

classes.name: Gemma3nTextMLP
classes.rationale: Same gate/up/down + gelu_pytorch_tanh as Gemma2/3 + activation_sparsity_pattern (top-k of activations); the dense path matches gemma4_mlp.py

classes.name: Gemma3nTextAltUp
classes.rationale: Gemma3n AltUp routing block (multi-stream coefficients via small Linear); custom block, decomposes to Linear

classes.name: Gemma3nTextAttention
classes.rationale: Standard q/k/v/o + q_norm/k_norm + RoPE + sliding_window. Same structure as Gemma3Attention; L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention with qk_norm=True covers it (Gemma RMSNorm caveat applies)

classes.name: Gemma3nTextDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: AltUp + Laurel + Attention + MLP with multiple Gemma3RMSNorms

classes.name: Gemma3nTextModel
classes.rationale: Wiring text-only model with AltUp routing

classes.name: Gemma4ClippableLinear
classes.rationale: Linear with weight/output clipping; closest is L1/linear.py with manual clamps

classes.name: Gemma4AudioAttention
classes.rationale: Audio Conformer attention; no kb-nano file

classes.name: Gemma4AudioCausalConv1d
classes.rationale: Causal Conv1d (left-padded). L1/causal_conv1d.py is dedicated to causal convolutions

classes.name: Gemma4AudioLightConv1d
classes.rationale: Light Conformer Conv1d block: pointwise + GLU + depthwise causal conv + activation + pointwise

classes.name: Gemma4AudioLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: macaron FFN + audio attention + light conv + FFN

classes.name: Gemma4VisionPooler
classes.rationale: Multi-head attention pooling head with cls/latent token + cross-attention; matches L2/attention_pool.py:AttentionPoolLatent (per audit rule for AttentionPoolingHead with cls + K/V + SDPA)

classes.name: Gemma4VisionMLP
classes.rationale: Same gate/up/down + gelu_pytorch_tanh; L2/gemma4_mlp.py is dedicated

classes.name: Gemma4VisionRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: 2D vision RoPE; L1/vision_rotary_emb.py is the matching kernel (per audit rule on vision RoPE)

classes.name: Gemma4VisionAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits Gemma3Attention with q_norm/k_norm + 2D RoPE; L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention with qk_norm=True covers the topology

classes.name: Gemma4TextMLP
classes.rationale: Dense text MLP; L2/gemma4_mlp.py with GeluAndMul('tanh')

classes.name: Gemma4TextAttention
classes.rationale: Gemma4-specific attention with q_norm/k_norm/v_norm and per-layer K==V global head dim. Verified L2/gemma4_attention.py:Gemma4Attention implements this exactly: q/k/v RMSNorms, weightless v_norm, layer_type-aware head_dim, sliding window per layer (lines 14-67)

classes.name: Gemma4TextExperts
classes.rationale: Mixtral-style experts (gate/up/down per expert with SiLU); the fused-MoE kernel is L2/fused_experts.py + L1/moe_grouped_gemm.py

classes.name: Gemma4TextRouter
classes.rationale: Gemma4 router: pre-norm (RMSNorm without affine) + scale + Gemma4GateLinear + scaled softmax routing. Verified L2/gemma4_moe.py:Gemma4Router implements identical norm/scale/proj structure (lines 40-58)

classes.name: Gemma4TextDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: Attention + dense MLP + (MoE) with multiple norms

classes.name: Gemma4AssistantMaskedEmbedder
classes.rationale: Token embedding with masking (gemma4 assistant draft input embedder); single nn.Embedding lookup with mask

classes.name: Gemma4AssistantForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Wiring: assistant draft model on top of Gemma4 (decoder + masked embedder + lm_head); no own kernels

classes.name: GitEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-style word + position embeddings + LayerNorm + Dropout (no token_type). L2/encoder_embeddings.py:EncoderEmbeddingsBase is the base; GitEmbeddings is a simpler subset

classes.name: GitSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with separate Q/K/V Linear (with bias), softmax, dropout, image+text token concat. Verified L2/encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention has separate q/k/v Linear bias=True and SDPA path

classes.name: GitAttention
classes.rationale: Wiring around GitSelfAttention + GitSelfOutput (BERT pattern). Compute lives on GitSelfAttention; mark composes per rule 11

classes.name: GitVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: CLIP-style vision embeddings: Conv2d patch + class embedding + position embeddings

classes.name: GitVisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1 + ACT2FN(quick_gelu/gelu) + fc2 (CLIP-style). L2/clip_mlp.py:CLIPMLP uses QuickGELU; verified the structure matches when activation is quick_gelu

classes.name: GitVisionAttention
classes.rationale: CLIP-style multi-head attention with separate q/k/v/out_proj Linear, manual scaled dot-product. Verified L2/clip_attention.py implements identical separate q/k/v + BMM + Softmax (no causal mask)

classes.name: GlmMLP
classes.rationale: Phi3MLP pattern: fused gate_up_proj (2*intermediate) -> chunk -> activation_fn(gate) * up -> down_proj. With hidden_act='silu' this is exactly SwiGLU. Verified L2/llama_mlp.py uses MergedColumnParallelLinear gate_up + SiluAndMul + RowParallelLinear, identical compute

classes.name: GlmRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard RoPE with partial_rotary_factor (rotary applied to first dim*pf and pass-through after). L1/rotary_emb.py is the unified RoPE kernel

classes.name: GlmAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits LlamaAttention; only override is o_proj bias=False. Uses interleaved RoPE pattern (rotate_half x[0::2]/x[1::2]) with partial_rotary_factor. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers

classes.name: Glm4MLP
classes.rationale: Same Phi3MLP SwiGLU as GLM (silu); maps to L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: Glm4DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: input_LN + Glm4Attention + post_self_attn_LN + post_attention_LN + Glm4MLP + post_mlp_LN (extra norms vs Llama)

classes.name: Glm4Attention
classes.rationale: Pure pass-through of GlmAttention (= LlamaAttention with bias-less o_proj); L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention

classes.name: Glm46VModel
classes.rationale: Wiring: AutoModel-loaded vision (glm4v_vision) + AutoModel-loaded text (glm4v_text); pure config wrapper around Glm4vModel

classes.name: Glm4MoeAttention
classes.rationale: Standard q/k/v/o Linear + optional q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm (use_qk_norm) + RoPE (partial). L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers (qk_norm flag)

classes.name: Glm4MoeMLP
classes.rationale: DeepseekV3MLP is gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj + SiLU (SwiGLU). L2/llama_mlp.py is the matching kernel

classes.name: Glm4MoeTopkRouter
classes.rationale: DeepSeek-V3 grouped top-k router: sigmoid + e_score_correction_bias + grouped top-k. L1/grouped_topk.py is the matching kernel (used by L2/deepseek_moe.py)

classes.name: Glm4MoeRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-style RMSNorm (weight init to ones)

classes.name: Glm4MoeDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: shallow dense + MoE layers (first_k_dense_replace dense layers, rest MoE)

classes.name: Glm4MoeLiteAttention
classes.rationale: DeepSeek-V3 MLA attention (latent-compressed Q/K/V projections); L2/deepseek_mla_attention.py is the dedicated wrapper

classes.name: Glm4MoeLiteNaiveMoe
classes.rationale: Naive Python loop over experts (eager fallback); kb-nano always uses fused; mark as wiring without specific kb-nano file

classes.name: Glm4MoeLiteMoE
classes.rationale: DeepSeek-V3 MoE pattern: GroupedTopK router + n_shared_experts (LlamaMLP) + routed experts. Verified L2/deepseek_moe.py covers shared+routed pattern

classes.name: Glm4vRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-style RMSNorm (Glm4 uses ones-init, not Gemma's)

classes.name: Glm4VisionMlp
classes.rationale: Qwen2.5 VL MLP is gate/up/down + SiLU SwiGLU; matches L2/llama_mlp.py

classes.name: Glm4vVisionPatchMerger
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm + GELU + gate/up/down SwiGLU-style merger (post-projection-norm activation differs from standard SwiGLU)

classes.name: Glm4vVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Learned 2D pos embedding interpolated via grid_sample to per-patch positions; L1/grid_sample.py + L1/embedding.py cover

classes.name: Glm4vVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Fused QKV (single nn.Linear * 3) + 2D rotary application + non-causal SDPA. Closest existing kb-nano file is L2/vit_encoder_attention.py:VitEncoderAttention which has fused QKV + SDPA (no rotary internal); the rotary is applied externally

classes.name: Glm4vTextRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Multi-axis RoPE (M-RoPE) with mrope_section across temporal/height/width grids (3D position ids); L1/mrope.py is the dedicated kernel for Qwen-VL/Glm-VL

classes.name: Glm4vTextAttention
classes.rationale: Standard q/k/v/o Linear with q/k bias, RoPE (interleaved), causal mask. L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers (bias=True for qkv)

classes.name: Glm4vVisionModel
classes.rationale: Wiring vision tower with patch embed + blocks + downsample (Conv2d) + merger

classes.name: Glm4vMoeTextAttention
classes.rationale: GLM-style attention (q/k/v/o Linear + RoPE + causal); L2/attention.py:LlamaAttention covers

classes.name: Glm4vMoeTextNaiveMoe
classes.rationale: Naive Python expert loop; eager fallback only

classes.name: Glm4vMoeTextMoE
classes.rationale: Glm4Moe MoE = DeepSeek-V3 MoE pattern; L2/deepseek_moe.py covers

classes.name: Glm4vMoeTextMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU MLP for shallow dense layers

classes.name: GlmImageVisionMLP
classes.rationale: SigLIP-style MLP: fc1 + GELU + fc2 (no gating). Verified L2/siglip_mlp.py:SigLIPMLP matches exactly

classes.name: GlmImageVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Fused QKV vision attention (same shape as Glm4vVisionAttention, with overrides to head_dim/num_heads)

classes.name: GlmImageVQVAEVectorQuantizer
classes.rationale: Vector quantizer codebook (nn.Embedding); Chameleon VQ-VAE pattern

classes.name: GlmMoeDsaIndexer
classes.rationale: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) indexer for V3.2 sparse attention; verified L2/sparse_attn_indexer.py is the dedicated kernel for this

classes.name: GlmMoeDsaAttention
classes.rationale: DeepSeek MLA attention with DSA sparse indexing (V3.2 pattern). L2/deepseek_mla_attention.py + L2/sparse_attn_indexer.py is the matching combo (per LESSONS_LEARNED #4 deepseek_v3)
